_comment: Every visible string on the site lives here. Edit at /admin or by hand. Keys starting with _ are notes for editors and never render. See content/SCHEMA.md for a field guide.

meta._comment: Browser tab title and search/social description.
meta.description: Prasanna Kumar Reddy Peram — Product Engineer with 3.5+ years shipping production software end to end: Python services, REST APIs, and Generative-AI features.

hero._comment: Full-screen 3D neural-network hero. resumeFile is a path under /public.
hero.name: Prasanna Kumar Reddy
hero.title: Product Engineer · Backend & Generative AI
hero.subtitle: I build products end to end — turning user problems into production Python services, REST APIs, and AI features that customers actually use.

about._comment: photo is a path under /public; empty string shows a stylized placeholder.
about.heading: Product Engineer who ships — from user to production.
paragraphs: Product Engineer who owns features end to end — from talking to users and shaping the roadmap to writing production Python, designing REST APIs, and embedding Generative AI into the product.

3.5+ years shipping software across product, HR-tech, and banking teams, grounded in Object-Oriented design, CI/CD, and SQL performance tuning. I measure success by customer impact over lines of code — making independent design and UX calls, iterating fast on feedback, and rebuilding when the data points to a better solution.
about.photoAlt: Portrait of Prasanna Kumar Reddy Peram

experience._comment: Work history, newest first. current:true shows the live badge.
experience.heading: Where I've shipped.

points: Own product features end to end — from talking to users and shaping the roadmap to writing full-stack code, shipping to production, and supporting customers directly.
Translate customer pain points and business requirements into working software, making independent design and UX decisions to build experiences that solve real problems.
Build and ship production Python services and REST APIs, embedding Generative AI / LLM capabilities into the product to automate workflows and unlock new features.
Prioritize against the product roadmap, estimate technical effort, write clear technical specs, and keep quality high through code review and automated testing in CI/CD.
Measure success by customer impact over lines of code — iterating fast on user feedback and rebuilding when the data points to a better solution.
Built an HR AI virtual assistant on the Rasa stack — job discovery, FAQs, candidate pre-screening, interview scheduling, and personalized job recommendations.
Developed and optimized RESTful APIs (GET / PATCH / DELETE) for client-specific bot configuration, cutting manual intervention by implementation teams by 40%.
Designed an API automation framework with Karate covering every bot-team service, reducing manual QA effort by 50% and accelerating the deployment lifecycle.
Integrated multi-channel experiences — Web, SMS, MS Teams, WhatsApp, Facebook — with event-driven architectures for seamless data flow across systems.
Enforced code quality via PyTest, Pylint, and SonarLint on Git/GitHub with Jenkins CI/CD; led OOP-based internal-gig business logic and its integrity constraints.
Contributed to the end-to-end SDLC of high-availability banking production systems, holding to strict security and performance standards.
Developed robust REST APIs for seamless data exchange with third-party banking modules.
Built automated background schedulers for high-volume batch processing and system monitoring.
Optimized complex queries and relational data models for integrity and responsiveness under heavy load.

projects._comment: image empty string → a unique themed SVG placeholder is drawn per motif (chatbot | api | automation | network | bank | ai). details[] carries the full story shown in the modal.
projects.heading: Things I've built.
projects.blurb: Production systems from HR-tech chatbots to banking backends — each one shipped, measured, and iterated.

items.title: HR AI Virtual Assistant
items.tagline: Conversational AI that screens, schedules, and recommends jobs for thousands of candidates.
details: Developed an HR AI virtual assistant on the Rasa stack that displays jobs, resolves user queries and FAQs, pre-screens candidates, and schedules interviews with recruiters.
Added personalized job recommendations based on user interests and behavior.
Shipped across candidate experience (web, Facebook, text-to-apply SMS) and employee experience (web, text-to-refer SMS, MS Teams) platforms.
Automated WhatsApp messaging flows through predefined Python functions and built regex support for client-specific email and mobile formats.

items.title: Bot Configuration Platform
items.tagline: Self-serve REST APIs that cut manual bot configuration work by 40%.
details: Designed GET / PATCH / DELETE REST APIs to update bot messages for client-specific requirements — removing most manual work for implementation teams.
Built a customized job-alerts feature flag so clients can enable or disable features per tenant.
Developed microservices with the Python Sanic framework behind an API gateway.
Wrote maintenance scripts to bulk-update bot messages while preserving structure and hygiene.

items.title: Karate API Automation Suite
items.tagline: BDD-style API test coverage for every bot-team service — QA effort down 50%.
details: Designed and implemented a Karate-based API automation framework covering all services owned by the bot team.
Wrote BDD scenarios in Gherkin syntax for readability, reusability, and traceability to business requirements.
Wired the suite into Jenkins CI/CD so every release is gated by the automation pass.
Reduced manual QA effort by roughly 50% and accelerated the deployment lifecycle.

items.title: Internal Gigs Platform
items.tagline: OOP business logic for company-internal short-term jobs with airtight integrity rules.
details: Led the object-oriented business logic for 'gigs' — small jobs internal to the company.
Enforced integrity constraints such as preventing a gig manager from applying to gigs they created.
Collaborated with the product team through grooming, tech talks, and sprint ceremonies to shape the feature.

items.title: Banking Backend Services
items.tagline: High-availability backend features for production banking systems.
details: Developed backend features for a production banking project under strict security and performance standards.
Built APIs to retrieve user information for third-party banking modules.
Implemented automated background schedulers for high-volume batch processing and monitoring.
Profiled and tuned critical features with Postman and debugging tools.

items.title: GenAI Product Features
items.tagline: LLM-powered workflows embedded directly into a live product.
details: Embed Generative AI / LLM capabilities into product features at Denalix Tech — automating workflows and unlocking functionality that wasn't feasible before.
Ship production Python services and REST APIs that wrap model calls with guardrails, evals, and observability.
Iterate directly with users: measure impact, keep what works, rebuild what doesn't.
